title: polygala alpestris subsp. morisiana
intro: Polygala alpestris subsp. morisiana is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family, and is native to the mountainous regions of Italy. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support kidney and urinary health due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Polygala alpestris subsp. morisiana include its potential to alleviate conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and edema. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the kidneys and urinary system in traditional medicine.
